items.label: Installation
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

ZYNQ Games is a client-side game library engine.
No backend required. Everything runs in the browser.

## Installation

### Script tag
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

### ES Module
```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

## Usage
```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

After initialization:
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
ZYNQ.games.total
```

items.label: Internal State
items.content:
# Internal State

This section describes the full runtime state of ZYNQ Games.

## Configuration
```ts
config: {
  src: string,
  cdn: string
}
```

## Game Collections
```ts
all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]
```

## User Data
```ts
favorites: Set<string>
history: string[]
```

## Device Detection
```ts
deviceType: number
```

## Game Object Structure
```ts
Game {
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices: number[],

  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

items.label: init()
items.content:
# init(options)
Initializes the engine and loads game data via `version` hash, `src` (JSON), or `cdn` (Assets).

### Options
```ts
{ mode: 'all' | 'supported' | 'favs', search: string, sort: 'name' | 'alias', version: string /* GH Hash */, src: string /* JSON source */, cdn: string /* Image source */ }
```

### Returns
`Promise<ZYNQGames>`

items.label: search()
items.content:
# search(query)

Filters games by name or alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("bloon")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Example Result
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Bloons Tower Defense",
    "alias": "bloons-tower-defense",
    "url": "g1/bloons-tower-defense",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloons-tower-defense.webp",
    "category": "strategy",
    "devices": [1,2,3,4],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

items.label: getByAlias()
items.content:
# getByAlias(alias)

Returns a single game by its unique alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("bloxorz")
```

## Returns
```ts
Game | null
```

## Example
```json
{
  "name": "Bloxorz",
  "alias": "bloxorz",
  "url": "g1/bloxorz",
  "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
  "category": "puzzle",
  "devices": [1,2],
  "isSupported": true,
  "isFavorite": false
}
```

items.label: getByCategory()
items.content:
# getByCategory(category)

Filters games by category.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("puzzle")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "2048",
    "alias": "2048",
    "url": "g1/2048",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/2048.webp",
    "category": "puzzle",
    "devices": [1,2,3,4],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

items.label: filterSupported()
items.content:
# filterSupported()

Keeps only games supported on the current device.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: filterFavorites()
items.content:
# filterFavorites()

Filters only favorite games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: reset()
items.content:
# reset()

Resets all filters and restores full game list.

```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: sortBy()
items.content:
# sortBy(field)

Sorts games alphabetically based on a field.

## Supported fields
```ts
name | alias | category
```

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: sortByPopularity()
items.content:
# sortByPopularity()

Sorts games based on `playCount`.

Important:
- `playCount` is optional in dataset
- if missing, value defaults to 0

This means results only become meaningful if you track plays yourself.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: shuffle()
items.content:
# shuffle()

Randomly shuffles current list.

```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: random()
items.content:
# random(limit)

Returns a random subset of games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.random(3)
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Bloxorz",
    "alias": "bloxorz",
    "url": "g1/bloxorz",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
    "category": "puzzle",
    "devices": [1,2],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

items.label: getRandomOne()
items.content:
# getRandomOne()

Returns a single random game from the dataset.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

## Returns
```ts
Game
```

items.label: Favorites
items.content:
# Favorites System

```js

```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

---

### isFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("bloxorz")
```

## Returns
```ts
boolean
```

items.label: History
items.content:
# History System

### addToHistory(alias)
```js

```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

---

### getHistory()
```js

```

## Returns


---

### clearHistory()
```js

```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```
